name: kiva-design-system
description: Using Kiva's design system: the router skill over design tokens — typography, color, spacing, radius, layout, and color-themes.

interface.shortDescription: Use Kiva's design system: tokens, type, color, spacing, radius, layout
interface.longDescription: The entry point for using Kiva's design system. A router skill over the design tokens — typography, color, spacing, radius, layout, and color-themes — for auditing code for design-system compliance, generating new UI with the correct tokens and utilities, and Figma-to-code handoff.
